# fallmap

> Paste your workflow · see what a £20k consultant builds · see the sovereign version that does the same for £0 · single HTML · on-device · prime 241 · sovereign single-file tool · MIT-licensed · Ed25519-signed · listed on FallMarket.

fallmap is a sovereign tool built by the AI-Native Solutions guild. It runs on your machine, ships with source, and never phones home.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmap/

## Category

sovereign single-file tool. Part of the FallMarket sovereign agent marketplace (https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/).

## Install

```
Fork the repo and open the source.
```

## About AI-Native Solutions

AI-Native Solutions builds sovereign single-file AI tools, MCP servers, SDKs, and HTTP APIs. All work is MIT, all is Ed25519-signed, all is discoverable via FallMarket. This tool is one entry in a 766-listing catalog.
